'''Goblin moss''' was a moss type known for its distinct green [[Color/Legends|color]]. Many [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] soldiers used the expression "Green as Goblin moss" to describe fresh recruits.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] {{Mo}}
